name: vera-language
description: Language support for the Vera programming language: proof-aware diagnostics, hover, slot go-to-definition, and typed-hole completion via the vera lsp language server, plus full syntax highlighting - for a statically typed, purely functional language with algebraic effects and mandatory contracts, designed for LLM-generated code.

vera.lsp.enabled.description: Start the Vera language server (vera lsp) for .vera files.

vera.lsp.path.description: Command used to launch the language server; an absolute path to the vera binary or a name resolved from PATH. The server needs the [lsp] extra: pip install -e ".[lsp]".
